sections.paragraph:
& חִלְקִיָּהוּ (“the portion of Jehovah,” i.e. peculiarly appropriated to God), Hilkiah, pr.n.-

(1) of the high priest in the reign of Josiah, 2Ki 22:8, 12 2Ki 22:12.-(2) of the father of Jeremiah, Jer 1:1.-(3) the father of Eliakim, 2Ki 18:18, 26 2Ki 18:26 Isa 22:20 36:3 .-(4) 1Ch 26:11.-(5) Jer 29:3.-(6) 1Ch 6:30.-(7) Neh 8:4.
